gauge.name: Iowa River above Coralville Dam

impacts.statement: Cottage Reserve Road NE is closed.
Boating is prohibited on the Coralville Lake Reservoir and Lake MacBride.
The intersection of Cou Falls Road and Amana Road is closed.
Low lying areas surrounding the lake and upstream of the lake become flooded. Amana Road is closed from Falcon Ave to Cou Falls.

The west overlook boat ramp closes, including day use areas and beaches. Swan Lake Road is closed between Greencastle Ave and Half Moon Ave. Amana Road is closed between Falcon Ave and Blain Cemetary Road.
Portions of Swan Lake Road, Amana Road and 140th St are closed.
Road closure on 140th St west of Ely Road.
Road closures along portions of Sandy Beach Road.

dataAttribution.title: Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Army Corps of Engineers

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
